basics.name: Sachin Bisht
basics.label: Software Developer
basics.summary: Software Developer with expertise in Computer Vision, 3D Reconstruction, and Backend Systems, building scalable pipelines for drone mapping, point cloud processing, and mesh generation using Python and GPU acceleration.

highlights: Working on a Project to develop robust software for maintaining and processing data of A Pharmaceutical Organization.
Worked on various Computer Vision related tasks such as Image stitching for seamless Panorama and Orthophotos, including tech stack such as OpenCV, computer Vision, python.
Working on a Backend Project to make an interface for Drone mapping Project.
Trained a Table detection Model with an accuracy of 97.8 Percent.
Performed Research and Development in a Project related to Layout Understanding of a Document Helping in NLP and Database Projects.

projects.name: Layout Data preparation and model training
highlights: Created a layout model dataset which was to differentiate the different components of the data and then further predict the objects to their classes. Also trained the dataset on different models and compared their accuracy to the current model in use.

projects.name: Table Extraction and Classification
highlights: Developed an automated multi-model table extraction pipeline, comparing outputs from three deep learning models to rank accuracy and reliability.
Implemented OCR-based extraction and post-processing pipelines for structured data ingestion into databases.

projects.name: Image mapping, stitching and 3D Model generation
highlights: Implemented dense point cloud generation from aerial imagery and converted it into high-quality 3D meshes using Poisson and TSDF reconstruction.

projects.name: Drone Survey Website Backend
highlights: Worked on Python Programming for the backend of the website that will deal with the drone survey mapping.

projects.name: Time Capsule
highlights: Working on a project that saves image to an exact location that can later be explored by other memory hunters.
